title: Intensely Smoky Russian Beef Kebabs
description: A traditional Russian dish featuring smoky beef kebabs with a mustardy flavor, cooked to perfection on a binchotan grill. This low-sodium recipe is perfect for a healthy dinner option.
instructions: Preheat the binchotan grill to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together Dijon mustard, garlic powder, onion powder, smoked paprika, black pepper, and salt-free seasoning blend.
Add the beef strips to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the mustard mixture.
Thread the beef strips onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the grill with vegetable oil to prevent sticking.
Place the skewers on the grill and cook for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally.
Reduce heat to medium-low and continue cooking for an additional 5 minutes, or until the beef reaches an internal temperature of 145 degrees.
Remove the skewers from the grill and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
